title: TYPES OF COERCIVE MEASURES IN THE CIVIL PROCEEDINGS: NATIONAL AND FOREIGN EXPERIENCE
author: Davronov Doniyorbek Abdullo o`g`li
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article deals with the concept and necessity of coercive measures in the judicial process, international practice in this area, the role and importance of coercive measures in society, the judicial system, the theoretical and practical issues of the basis and procedure for applying coercive measures.
steps_raw: This article deals with the concept and necessity of coercive measures in the judicial process, international practice in this area, the role and importance of coercive measures in society, the judicial system, the theoretical and practical issues of the basis and procedure for applying coercive measures.
keywords: coercive measures, court fine, removal from the courtroom, compulsory attendance, judicial fine
